subject: A horde of skeletal undead warriors from Disney's The Black Cauldron — multiple armored skeleton figures with weapons rising in a dark forest environment
suspected_ip: Cauldron Born / Horned King's Army (The Black Cauldron)
description: Multiple undead warrior figures fill the frame — skeletal faces with glowing eyes visible, clad in scraps of dark armor, holding swords and bladed weapons. The central and most prominent figure has a skull face with decaying armored shoulders and raises a weapon overhead. The background is a dark forest or cavern with a pale overhead light source casting dramatic shadows from above. The composition places several skeleton soldiers at varying distances, suggesting a group advancing together as a horde. The mood is threatening and grim, capturing the 'mindless' quality of magically-animated dead troops.
foreground: Skeletal armored figure with sword raised, skull face and decayed armor
background: Dark forest canopy with overhead pale light, more skeleton figures
